g.text: LKE Cluster-01 (Consumer) <-> Cluster-02 (Provider) + External PostgreSQL VM
Flow 1: pg-client -> Listener postgresql-db:5432 -> VAN tunnel -> Connector -> PostgreSQL VM :5432 (TLS passthrough)
Flow 2: pg-client -> Listener podinfo:9898 -> VAN tunnel -> Connector -> podinfo ClusterIP :9898
Setup: cluster-01 issues token -> cluster-02 redeems -> mTLS link | TLS: Skupper mTLS + PostgreSQL SSL (cert fingerprint verified)
